titles.title: When the Lord Lifted My Burdens and Set Me Free

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh! When the Lord Lifted my burdens and Set Me free, Lifted my burdens soul Open my eyes and now I can see Praise God I'm from sin set free.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was found in this troubled World, Knowing not which way to church, Sing happy bound But Jesus set me free, And took all my sin away.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Since Jesus save me and Make me bore, There's a rejoicing down in my soul, Life is for reaning, each step I take, For Jesus leads the way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Praise God I'm from sin set free. Praise God I'm from sin set free.
